name: Denial Repulse
additional_info: When Flame of Denial activates, release an explosion around you. This deals 20 Flamecharm damage with 5 Flamecharm scaling, meaning it gains 0.1 damage per Flamecharm investment for a total damage of 30 at 100 Flamecharm. This cannot be parried nor dodged, but can be blocked, dealing 5 posture damage. Has a windup of 0.6s.
desc: You now emit a delayed burst of flames after coming close to death.
